description: Create a GeoGebra file comparing two mathematical models of the St. Louis Gateway Arch: an inverted catenary f(x) = 630 - 128*(cosh(x/128) - 1) and a parabolic approximation g(x) = 630*(1 - (x/315)^2). Ensure both curves are visible in the Graphics View and include a text annotation labeling or comparing the curves. Save the project as 'gateway_arch_comparison.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
